entries.title: Senior Developer & Platform Engineer
entries.description: Built and launched the official NSTM website from initial concept through full deployment.
bullets: Designed and implemented responsive UI/UX for optimal visitor experience across devices
Developed and integrated core features including membership, events, resources, and informational content
Managed backend functionality, CMS architecture, and dynamic content workflows
Oversaw hosting infrastructure, DNS configuration, server management, and performance optimization
Administer regular updates, security patches, and technical troubleshooting to maintain high uptime
Monitor site analytics and user behavior to continually enhance usability and accessibility

entries.title: Senior Developer & Pen Tester
entries.description: Architected and built an 18+ creator-monetization platform focused on Nigerian/African creators.
bullets: Designed multiple monetization streams: subscriptions, tips, private messages, and pay-per-view
Built real-time messaging and notification systems with Socket.IO
Oversaw infrastructure setups, performance optimization, deployment, and security for high-availability environments on AWS
Conducted penetration testing and security audits to harden the platform

entries.title: Senior Developer & IT Personnel
entries.description: Led end-to-end full-stack development and infrastructure operations.
bullets: Architected and deployed scalable web applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL/MySQL
Designed RESTful APIs and real-time systems using Socket.IO and Redis
Implemented secure authentication, role-based access control, and payment integrations
Managed VPS and AWS cloud environments, including CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerization, server configuration, DNS, and load balancing
Built and maintained admin dashboards, analytics tools, subscription systems, and tiered pricing models
Ensured system scalability, reliability, uptime, and rapid troubleshooting to support continuous user growth

entries.title: Head Instructor
entries.description: Delivered instruction in web development, IT fundamentals, and digital skills to learners.
bullets: Designed syllabus and curriculum for web development and IT fundamentals courses
Mentored students through hands-on projects and real-world application development
Maintained lab and IT environment for optimal learning experiences

entries.title: Lead Developer
entries.description: Architecting and building a multi-currency exchange platform with Go, Next.js, and PostgreSQL.
bullets: Built NGN ↔ GHS currency converter with Paystack and Momo wallet integration
Implemented ACID-compliant transaction processing for financial integrity
Designed SSO authentication and multi-currency wallet system

entries.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
entries.description: Built Laravel, React, and WordPress applications for Nigerian businesses.
bullets: Developed e-commerce platforms, corporate websites, and custom business tools
Built custom WordPress themes and Laravel backend systems
Managed VPS hosting, domain configuration, and client deployments
